SELECT * car;
SELECT * FROM dealership_system.car;

INSERT INTO dealership_system.car (serial_number, model, status, year) 
VALUES ('VIN12345', 'Toyota Vios', 'Available', 2024);
SELECT * FROM dealership_system.car;

-- 1. Create Keyspace
CREATE KEYSPACE IF NOT EXISTS dealership_system 
WITH replication = {'class': 'SimpleStrategy', 'replication_factor': 1};

USE dealership_system;

-- 2. Inventory Table (using 'vin' as industry standard)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS car (
    vin text PRIMARY KEY,
    brand text,
    model text,
    year int,
    price decimal,
    status text
);

-- 3. Customer Table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS customer (
    customer_id uuid PRIMARY KEY,
    first_name text,
    last_name text,
    phone text,
    email text
);

-- 4. Salesperson Table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS salesperson (
    emp_id text PRIMARY KEY,
    name text,
    position text,
    branch text
);

-- 5. Sales Transaction Table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sales (
    sale_id uuid PRIMARY KEY,
    vin text,
    customer_name text,
    emp_name text,
    sale_date timestamp,
    final_price decimal
);

-- 6. Sample Data (So the UI isn't empty)
INSERT INTO car (vin, brand, model, year, price, status) 
VALUES ('VIN12345', 'Toyota', 'Vios', 2024, 850000, 'Available');

INSERT INTO salesperson (emp_id, name, position, branch) 
VALUES ('EMP001', 'Marian Obejas', 'Senior Dealer', 'Taguig');
DROP TABLE car;
SELECT * FROM dealership_system.car;

CREATE KEYSPACE IF NOT EXISTS dealership_system 
WITH replication = {'class': 'SimpleStrategy', 'replication_factor': 1};

USE dealership_system;

-- Inventory Table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS car (
    vin varchar PRIMARY KEY, --vin is same as SerialNumber, mas pinaikli lang
    brand varchar, --additional column (wala sa erd ito)
    model varchar,
    year int, --What year ginawa yung car'
    type varchar,
    price decimal, 
    status varchar, --'Available', 'Reserved' or 'Sold'
);

-- Customer Table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS customer (
    customer_id int PRIMARY KEY,
    customer_name varchar,
    address varchar,
    phone varchar,
    email varchar --additional column (wala sa erd ito)
);

-- Invoice Table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS invoice (
    invoice_number int PRIMARY KEY,
    date timestamp,
    total_ammount decimal
    sp_name varchar, --denormalized
    customer_name varchar, --denormalized
    car_model varchar --denormalized
);

-- Salesperson Table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS salesperson (
    salesperson_id int PRIMARY KEY,
    sp_name varchar,
    position varchar,
    branch varchar
);

-- Service Ticket
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS service_ticket (
    ticket_id INTO PRIMARY KEY,
    vin varchar,
    customer_name varchar,
    mechanic_name varchar,
    service_date timestamp,
    labor_cost decimal,
    parts_list list <varchar>, --denormalized junction table
    parts_cost decimal,
    total_cost decimal
);

-- Mechanic Table 
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mechanic (
    mechanic_id int PRIMARY KEY,
    mechanic_name varchar,
    specialization varchar
);

    sp_name varchar, --denormalized

CREATE KEYSPACE IF NOT EXISTS dealership_system 
WITH replication = {'class': 'SimpleStrategy', 'replication_factor': 1};

USE dealership_system;

-- Inventory Table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS car (
    vin varchar PRIMARY KEY,
    brand varchar,
    model varchar,
    year int,
    type varchar,
    price decimal, 
    status varchar
);

-- Customer Table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS customer (
    customer_id int PRIMARY KEY,
    customer_name varchar,
    address varchar,
    phone varchar,
);

-- Salesperson Table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS salesperson (
    salesperson_id int PRIMARY KEY,
    sp_name varchar,
    position varchar,
    branch varchar
);

-- Invoice Table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS invoice (
    invoice_number int PRIMARY KEY,
    invoice_date timestamp,
    total_amount decimal,
    salesperson_id int,
    sp_name varchar,
    customer_id int,
    customer_name varchar,
    vin varchar,
    payment_method varchar
);

-- Service Ticket
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS service_ticket (
    vin varchar,
    customer_id int,
    customer_name varchar,
    mechanic_id int,
    mechanic_name varchar,
    service_date timestamp,
    labor_cost decimal,
    parts_list list<varchar>,
    parts_cost decimal,
    total_cost decimal
    PRIMARY KEY (vin, ticket_id) 
) WITH CLUSTERING ORDER BY (ticket_id DESC);

-- Mechanic Table 
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mechanic (
    mechanic_id int PRIMARY KEY,
    mechanic_name varchar,
    specialization varchar
);

-- Service Ticket
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS service_ticket (
    vin varchar,
    customer_id int,

    PRIMARY KEY (vin, ticket_id) 
) WITH CLUSTERING ORDER BY (ticket_id DESC);

) WITH CLUSTERING ORDER BY (ticket_id DESC);

CREATE KEYSPACE IF NOT EXISTS dealership_system 
WITH replication = {'class': 'SimpleStrategy', 'replication_factor': 1};

USE dealership_system;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS car (
    vin varchar PRIMARY KEY,
    brand varchar,
    model varchar,

);

    status varchar -- New or Used
);

-- 4. Invoice Table
